title: AWS Added Claude Fable 5 Availability Through Bedrock And Claude Platform On AWS
summary: AWS announced Claude Fable 5 availability through Amazon Bedrock and Claude Platform on AWS, expanding AWS-hosted access for Anthropic's long-running coding and knowledge-work model family.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Evaluate Bedrock model access, regional availability, quotas, and pricing before routing Claude Fable 5 workloads through AWS.
Benchmark long-running coding and knowledge-work tasks before promoting this model into default agent routes.

detail.migration_notes: This event records AWS-hosted availability. APW does not assert first-party Anthropic API availability, region coverage, exact pricing, or account eligibility.

limitations: The source-review candidate classified this page as a pricing change; source-owner review corrected the public event to model availability after checking the official announcement.
APW does not copy provider announcement prose and does not assert workload suitability without independent testing.
